entries.gloss: child (often written こども in everyday text)
floor of a building (e.g., 3-かい = 3rd floor)
number of times / occurrences (e.g., 3-かい = three times). Same kana, different counter (different kanji); context disambiguates.
one day, a whole day (note: same kanji 一日 with a different reading, distinct from ついたち; context disambiguates)

entries.reading: まいとし / まいねん
entries.gloss: every year (まいとし is more common in conversation; まいねん in formal/written contexts)
already (with affirmative); anymore (with negative); more (as in もう一つ)
train (steam, archaic but still in older N5 lists)
to cut (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2)
to know (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2)
to take (a photo or video) - homophone of the above; uses a different kanji (not in N5 syllabus); semantically a specialization of "take"
to enter (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2)
to run (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2)
to return home (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2)
to play (a string instrument like guitar/piano)
to pull (homophone of the above; separate verb, separate kanji - both are common N5 readings of ひく)
to open (intransitive; pair with あける)
to close (intransitive; pair with しめる)
to take out, to put out (transitive; pair with でる)
to drop (transitive; pair with おちる)
to put up (an umbrella), to raise
to turn off, to erase (godan / Group 1; conjugates けします, けして)
to make (tea / coffee) (note: same form as 入れる; context distinguishes)
to go off, to disappear (intransitive; pair with けす)
to fall (intransitive; pair with おとす)
to tie / fasten / tighten (distinct from しめる "to close")
to work for / be employed (ichidan / Group 2; conjugates つとめます, つとめて)
to exist (animate) (also in §28 - listed here for thematic completeness with other existence/possession verbs)
to need (Group 1 exception - looks like Group 2; homophone of existence-いる which is Group 2)
hot (weather; separate adjective from the two below despite shared reading)
hot (to the touch; separate adjective and separate kanji - homophone of the hot-weather one)
thick (e.g., a thick book; separate adjective and separate kanji - third homophone of the あつい readings above)
early (time-related) - and separately, はやい - fast (speed-related). Two separate adjectives sharing the kana reading; the kanji disambiguates.
easy (of a task) - and separately, やさしい - kind / gentle (of a person). Two separate adjectives sharing the kana reading; different kanji distinguish them.
at, by, with (location of action / means)

entries.form: ありがとうございます
entries.reading: ありがとうございます

entries.gloss: souvenir (also in §22 - listed here for thematic completeness)
rest, holiday (noun form of やすむ)
way of doing (e.g., たべかた = how to eat)
business suit (older term, replaced by スーツ in modern usage)
big (variant adjectival form of 大きい)
dictionary (older term, alt for じしょ)
